description: Multi-architecture subsystem parity matrix for the Oreulia kernel.  Each entry declares which targets a subsystem is fully operational on.  'partial' means the subsystem is present but capability-limited (e.g. interpreter-only JIT path).

subsystems.name: wasm_interpreter
subsystems.notes: All targets share the same interpreter path in execution/wasm.rs

subsystems.name: wasm_jit
subsystems.notes: AArch64 falls back to interpreter; x86/x86_64 emit native code via wasm_jit.rs

subsystems.name: wasm_jit_extended_opcodes
subsystems.description: JIT coverage: narrow loads/stores, i64 arithmetic, call_indirect, clz/ctz
subsystems.notes: Step 12 expansion: I32Load8U/16U, I32Store8/16, I64Const/Add/Sub/Mul, I32Clz/Ctz, CallIndirect

subsystems.name: elf32_loader
subsystems.notes: Shared path in elf.rs; all arches can load i686 ELF32 binaries for cross-inspection

subsystems.name: elf64_loader
subsystems.description: ELF64 static executable loader with RELA relocation support
subsystems.notes: Step 6: ELF64/AArch64 RELA support added to elf.rs

subsystems.name: virtio_blk
subsystems.notes: PCI path for x86; MMIO path for AArch64 virt machine

subsystems.name: virtio_net
subsystems.notes: Step 8: virtio_net.rs created; capability-gated send via check_capability(Channel)

subsystems.name: e1000_driver
subsystems.notes: PCI bus required; not present on AArch64 virt platform

subsystems.name: rtl8139_driver
subsystems.notes: PCI bus required; not present on AArch64 virt platform

subsystems.name: wifi_driver
subsystems.notes: PCIe bus required; no MMIO WiFi implementation for AArch64 virt

subsystems.name: blk_bench
subsystems.description: Timed sequential-read block benchmark shell command
subsystems.notes: Step 10: blk-bench handler + help text added to commands_shared.rs

subsystems.name: crash_class_telemetry
subsystems.description: CrashClass enum + classify_panic() lock-free ring-buffer telemetry
subsystems.notes: Step 11: CrashClass taxonomy (MemFault, NullDeref, StackOverflow, etc.) in crash_log.rs

subsystems.name: capability_system
subsystems.notes: Shared implementation in capability/mod.rs; all arches benefit

subsystems.name: vfs_temporal_persistence
subsystems.description: Write-through temporal persistence layer in VFS
subsystems.notes: Step 4: real temporal write-through on AArch64 in vfs_platform.rs; AArch64 bridge shim removed

subsystems.name: aarch64_scheduler
subsystems.description: AArch64 context-switch with correct SPSR_EL1 and FP/SIMD scaffolding
subsystems.notes: Step 5: SPSR_EL1 fix + FP/SIMD context-save scaffolding in aarch64_scheduler.S

subsystems.name: capnet_capability_network
subsystems.notes: See docs/capnet.md; full x86_64 implementation; AArch64/i686 use stub until driver parity

ci_gates.description: CI jobs that must pass before any subsystem may be marked 'true'
